column1: I need to improve technical skills first because right now I do not trust my own placement readiness. I feel stuck between responsibility and ambition. I want a decision that is realistic, not emotional.

I keep failing interviews because of low confidence and communication issues, so I feel skill building should come first. I need clarity before making the wrong move. I want a decision that is realistic, not emotional.

My family depends on me financially and even though I care about higher studies, earning now feels more responsible. I need clarity before making the wrong move. I want a decision that is realistic, not emotional.

My parents trust government jobs more, and now I feel confused between private placement and UPSC preparation. This affects both my confidence and planning. Seeing others move ahead increases the pressure.

I know my family wants me to start earning, but I strongly believe MBA will improve my future more than a small job now. I feel stuck between responsibility and ambition. I want a decision that is realistic, not emotional.
Before taking major career decisions, I think I need internships and stronger practical experience first. I do not want to regret my decision later. Seeing others move ahead increases the pressure.
Even with some financial pressure, I feel investing in higher education now may help my family more later. I want practical advice, not just motivation. Sometimes I overthink this at night.
Working while preparing for CAT seems difficult, but choosing only one path feels even riskier. I do not want to regret my decision later. Sometimes I overthink this at night.
